rationale: Educ. Code §39.204 governs campus distinction designation criteria and committee composition. It has no reference to property tax, homestead exemptions, or Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict exists.
quote:
The commissioner by rule shall establish:
(1) standards for considering campuses for distinction designations under Section 39.203(c); and
(2) methods for awarding distinction designations to campuses.
_note: Rule text is entirely unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption change; no overlap in subject matter.
